## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Metadata and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, SEO performance, and next steps for their collaboration.](https://fathom.video/share/_rrZCTxgVJgUvx-yrJX1LPnZmBA8s_CL?tab=summary&timestamp=12.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content strategy shifted from refreshes to net-new content (8-10 pieces/week) to generate more signals](https://fathom.video/share/_rrZCTxgVJgUvx-yrJX1LPnZmBA8s_CL?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [Impressions are growing, but clicks remain low; team is optimistic about upcoming weeks' performance](https://fathom.video/share/_rrZCTxgVJgUvx-yrJX1LPnZmBA8s_CL?tab=summary&timestamp=196.0)
  - [Image creation bottleneck to be addressed; GrowthX to take over with AI-generated/stock options](https://fathom.video/share/_rrZCTxgVJgUvx-yrJX1LPnZmBA8s_CL?tab=summary&timestamp=703.0)
  - [Early to assess pipeline impact (4 months in); plan to regroup in early April for month 5 checkpoint](https://fathom.video/share/_rrZCTxgVJgUvx-yrJX1LPnZmBA8s_CL?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy and Performance

  - [Shifted focus from content refreshes to net-new content (8-10 pieces/week)](https://fathom.video/share/_rrZCTxgVJgUvx-yrJX1LPnZmBA8s_CL?tab=summary&timestamp=630.0)
  - [Google Search Console data shows growing impressions but low clicks](https://fathom.video/share/_rrZCTxgVJgUvx-yrJX1LPnZmBA8s_CL?tab=summary&timestamp=196.0)
  - [Impressions are a leading indicator of ranking, with room for improvement on click-through rates](https://fathom.video/share/_rrZCTxgVJgUvx-yrJX1LPnZmBA8s_CL?tab=summary&timestamp=426.0)
  - [Too early to assess pipeline impact at 4 months into the engagement](https://fathom.video/share/_rrZCTxgVJgUvx-yrJX1LPnZmBA8s_CL?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
  - [Comparison made to other clients (e.g., Galileo AI) showing typical growth patterns over time](https://fathom.video/share/_rrZCTxgVJgUvx-yrJX1LPnZmBA8s_CL?tab=summary&timestamp=453.0)

### Creative Bottleneck and Solutions

  - [Recent bottleneck in image creation due to designer's focus on AI agents project](https://fathom.video/share/_rrZCTxgVJgUvx-yrJX1LPnZmBA8s_CL?tab=summary&timestamp=794.0)
  - [GrowthX offered to take over image creation using:](https://fathom.video/share/_rrZCTxgVJgUvx-yrJX1LPnZmBA8s_CL?tab=summary&timestamp=824.0)
    1.  Stock image selection
    2.  AI-generated images
    3.  Illustrative AI-generated images
  - [Proposal to create a batch of images for editors to select from, rather than per-article creation](https://fathom.video/share/_rrZCTxgVJgUvx-yrJX1LPnZmBA8s_CL?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)

### SEO Strategy and Long-term Benefits

  - [Discussion on the long-term benefits of SEO vs. paid advertising](https://fathom.video/share/_rrZCTxgVJgUvx-yrJX1LPnZmBA8s_CL?tab=summary&timestamp=1514.0)
  - [Example of DeepGram's success: 24x traffic increase after 6 months, leading to significant growth](https://fathom.video/share/_rrZCTxgVJgUvx-yrJX1LPnZmBA8s_CL?tab=summary&timestamp=1543.0)
  - [G2.com mentioned as another example of successful long-term content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/_rrZCTxgVJgUvx-yrJX1LPnZmBA8s_CL?tab=summary&timestamp=1614.0)

### Potential New Project: Agency Directory

  - [Gil proposed creating an agency/fractional expert directory](https://fathom.video/share/_rrZCTxgVJgUvx-yrJX1LPnZmBA8s_CL?tab=summary&timestamp=1128.0)
  - [Suggestion to include B2B performance marketing agencies, content agencies, and fractional demand experts](https://fathom.video/share/_rrZCTxgVJgUvx-yrJX1LPnZmBA8s_CL?tab=summary&timestamp=1164.0)
  - [Decision made to postpone this project and reassess in early April](https://fathom.video/share/_rrZCTxgVJgUvx-yrJX1LPnZmBA8s_CL?tab=summary&timestamp=1660.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to share examples of AI-generated images for Metadata's approval](https://fathom.video/share/_rrZCTxgVJgUvx-yrJX1LPnZmBA8s_CL?tab=summary&timestamp=1009.0)
  - [Increase aggressiveness in content publishing over the next few weeks](https://fathom.video/share/_rrZCTxgVJgUvx-yrJX1LPnZmBA8s_CL?tab=summary&timestamp=1640.0)
  - [Anthony to assist with Spotlight report for closer-to-pipeline results](https://fathom.video/share/_rrZCTxgVJgUvx-yrJX1LPnZmBA8s_CL?tab=summary&timestamp=559.0)
  - [Regroup in early April for a month 5 checkpoint on strategy and overall direction](https://fathom.video/share/_rrZCTxgVJgUvx-yrJX1LPnZmBA8s_CL?tab=summary&timestamp=1632.0)
  - [Continue focus on net-new content creation and publishing](https://fathom.video/share/_rrZCTxgVJgUvx-yrJX1LPnZmBA8s_CL?tab=summary&timestamp=641.0)
  - [Address image creation bottleneck by transitioning to GrowthX-managed process](https://fathom.video/share/_rrZCTxgVJgUvx-yrJX1LPnZmBA8s_CL?tab=summary&timestamp=703.0)
